holdings.infoBox: SPHQ is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lam Research stock at 5.37%, GE Aerospace at 4.62%, Apple at 4.55%, Visa Inc. at 4.33%, and Costco Wholesale at 4.29%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Quality ETF (SPHQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Quality index. The fund tracks an index of US large-cap stocks selected by return on equity, changes in net operating assets and financial leverage. Stocks are weighted by these quality factors, scaled by market cap. SPHQ was launched on Dec 6, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.
